scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check firebase-repository.js && node --check functions/index.js
scripts.test:rules: npx firebase emulators:exec --only firestore "npx mocha tests/rules/**/*.test.js --timeout 20000"
scripts.test:functions: npx firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,functions "npx mocha tests/functions/**/*.test.js --timeout 30000"
scripts.test:security: npm run test:rules && npm run test:functions
